description: Questo sub-concetto separa gli odori che colpiscono immediatamente con grande forza (intensità) da quelli che sono percepiti debolmente ma persistono nel tempo (persistenza).
positive: The sudden burst of citrus, *un colpo al naso*, a powerful wave immediately filling my nostrils.
A brief, intense whiff of roasting coffee beans, *un aroma forte*, almost overwhelming my senses.
The pungent scent of garlic, *très intense*, hitting me directly in the throat with its force.
A sharp, immediate smell of pine needles, *ein stechender Geruch*, a powerful sensation in my sinuses.
The fragrance of jasmine, *muy potente*, a strong, immediate impact on my olfactory system.
A rush of cinnamon, *sicut ventus impetu*, a forceful and immediate olfactory experience.
A sudden blast of lavender, *a very strong aroma*, hitting my nose with unexpected intensity.
The immediate, intense scent of freshly cut grass, *un profumo potente*, filling my lungs.
A powerful, instantaneous smell of ammonia, *un parfum intense*, a sharp sensation in my nose.
The intense, immediate aroma of diesel fumes, *ein starker Geruch*, almost choking me.
A strong, immediate whiff of menthol, *un parfum intense*, tingling in my nasal passages.
The pungent, immediate scent of horseradish, *un aroma fortissimo*, hitting my palate.
A burst of vanilla, *un parfum puissant*, directly assaulting my olfactory receptors.
A sudden, intense smell of burnt sugar, *un profumo intenso*, almost painful in its strength.
The immediate, powerful fragrance of rose petals, *un parfum fort*, filling my breath.
A brief, intense whiff of saffron, *ein intensiver Duft*, stimulating my nasal membranes.
The immediate, powerful aroma of ripe mango, *un olor intenso*, a strong impact on my senses.
A rush of peppermint, *un parfum intense*, a forceful sensation in my nostrils.
The pungent, immediate scent of cumin, *un aroma intenso*, impacting my sinuses.
The immediate, powerful fragrance of sandalwood, *un parfum puissant*, a strong sensation in my lungs.
negative: A faint, lingering smell of old paper, *un profumo tenue*, barely noticeable but persistent.
A subtle, fleeting scent of rain on pavement, *a very faint aroma*, lingering faintly in the air.
The almost imperceptible fragrance of chamomile, *un parfum léger*, a gentle trace in my nostrils.
A whisper of cedarwood, *ein schwacher Duft*, lingering subtly in the back of my throat.
A trace of dried herbs, *un olor sutil*, a faint scent that fades quickly.
The barely perceptible aroma of beeswax, *sicut aura levis*, a transient and subtle impression.
A slight, fleeting scent of damp earth, *a faint aroma*, barely registering on my senses.
The almost nonexistent fragrance of dried flowers, *un parfum léger*, a faint trace in the air.
A subtle, transient scent of dust, *ein schwacher Geruch*, fading quickly from my nose.
A trace of old leather, *un olor tenue*, a fleeting scent that disappears quickly.
The very faint scent of sea salt, *un parfum léger*, lingering gently in my lungs.
A subtle, fleeting aroma of mushrooms, *un aroma tenue*, barely detectable.
The almost imperceptible fragrance of rainwater, *un parfum léger*, a transient trace in my nostrils.
A slight, fleeting scent of hay, *ein schwacher Duft*, quickly fading from my senses.
The barely perceptible aroma of clean linen, *un parfum léger*, a transient impression.
A trace of dried lavender, *un olor tenue*, barely noticeable and fading fast.
The very faint scent of freshly baked bread, *un parfum léger*, a fleeting memory.
A subtle, transient aroma of woodsmoke, *ein schwacher Geruch*, disappearing quickly.
A trace of chamomile tea, *un parfum léger*, a faint and fleeting scent.
The almost nonexistent fragrance of pine needles, *ein schwacher Duft*, vanishing quickly.
